features: FAST RELIEF: Masterplast Heat Massaging Cream provides instant relief and comfort for mild to moderate pain. Easy and ready to use, use the heat massaging cream relieves rheumatic pain, muscular aches and strains
WARMING: Effective, warming relief to the affected areas. Use directly after exercise if required
INNOVATIVE: Specially formulated to provide the healing properties of heat therapy, quickly and instantly, ideal to keep in a gym, sports or football kit bag

READY TO USE: Easy to apply a direct burst of warm relief to a specific area. The cream can be used immediately after exercise. Apply as often as required. Wash hands after use. For external use only. Do not use on broken or irritated skin
description: Product Description FAST RELIEF: Masterplast Heat Massaging Cream provides instant relief and comfort for mild to moderate pain. Easy and ready to use, use the heat massaging cream relieves rheumatic pain, muscular aches and strains. Effective, warming relief to the affected areas. Use directly after exercise if required. Easy to apply a direct burst of warm relief to a specific area. The cream can be used immediately after exercise. Apply as often as required. Wash hands after use. For external use only. Do not use on broken or irritated skin. 70g tube Ingredients Aqua, Petrolatum, Paraffinum Liquidum, Cetyl Alcohol, Stearic Acid, Propylene Glycol, Glyceryl Stearate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Polysorbate 60, Sorbitan Stearate, Methyl Salicylate, Menthol, Eucalyptus Globulus Oil, Methylparaben, Propylparaben, Disodium Pyrophosphate, Disodium Phosphate, Butylated Hydroxyanisole Directions 1. Apply the cream directly to the affected area for fast relief. 2. Use as often as required. Safety Warning For external use only. Do not use on broken or irritated skin. Wash hands after use. Manufacturer Contact Information 151 Products Limited, The Old School House, 39 Bengal Street, Manchester, M4 6AF, UK. See more
